notes: Covers uniformed members of paid fire departments, including permanent crash crewmen, crash boatmen, fire controlmen, and assistant fire controlmen at Logan International Airport. Pre-employment or subsequent physical exam must have failed to reveal any evidence of the condition. Presumption rebuttable by competent evidence.

Covers permanent members of police departments (including park police), MBTA police force, state police, and public works building police. Pre-employment or subsequent physical exam must have failed to reveal any evidence of the condition. Presumption rebuttable by competent evidence.

Covers employees in the Department of Correction or county correctional facility whose regular or incidental duties require care, supervision, or custody of prisoners, criminally insane persons, or defective delinquents. Pre-employment or subsequent physical exam must have failed to reveal any evidence of the condition. Presumption rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: disease of the lungs or respiratory tract
notes: Covers uniformed members of paid fire departments, including crash crewmen, crash boatmen, fire controlmen, and assistant fire controlmen at Logan International Airport. Must result in total disability or death. Presumed to result from inhalation of noxious fumes or poisonous gases. Pre-employment or subsequent physical exam must have failed to reveal any evidence of such condition. Rebuttable by competent evidence.

condition_specific: cancer affecting skin or central nervous, lymphatic, digestive, hematological, urinary, skeletal, oral, or prostate systems, lung or respiratory tract; any cancer linked to heat, radiation, or IARC-listed carcinogen with statistically significant correlation to fire service
filing_deadline_notes: Any person first discovering such condition within 5 years of the last date on which such person actively served is eligible to apply.
notes: Covers uniformed members of paid fire departments, members of state police assigned to fire investigation unit of Department of Fire Services, state police K-9 unit members, and Logan Airport crash crewmen/boatmen/fire controlmen. Must result in total disability or death. Requires: (1) 5 years minimum service; (2) cancer type must be one that may result from heat, radiation, or IARC-listed carcinogen; (3) member must have regularly responded to fire calls or investigation at scene. Pre-employment or subsequent exam must not have revealed the condition. Post-termination window: discovery within 5 years of last active service date. Rebuttable by preponderance of evidence of non-service-connected risk factors or hazards.
